_meta.validation: §6.5 fresh-context agent fan-out: one fresh agent per query, given only the anonymized description + that single query, pure relevance question, verdicts adjudicated from reasoning (results archived alongside in results-2026-07-15.json).

evals.query: this healing potion from my follower mod restores 150 health instantly, that's way too strong for Requiem — bring it in line
evals.note: core: balance a modded potion for Requiem

evals.query: patch the food items from Gourmet of Skyrim so they work with Requiem's survival and nutrition system
evals.note: core: food + Requiem nutrition system

evals.query: my mod adds a custom mead, what effects and value should it have in Requiem?
evals.note: alcohol kit derivation

evals.query: the modded skooma variant in this mod is priced like vanilla and has no drawbacks, requiemify it
evals.note: drug class, casual phrasing

evals.query: I added a new ingredient (frost lotus) — set up its four alchemy effects the way Requiem expects
evals.note: ingredient quartet mapping

evals.query: go through everything in KvSweets.esp and make the sweets Requiem-consistent
evals.note: whole-plugin consumable bulk pass

evals.query: make this stew craftable at the cooking pot with a Requiem-appropriate recipe
evals.note: COBJ cookpot recipe

evals.query: the poisons from this hunter mod barely tick for anything under Requiem, fix their magnitudes and prices
evals.note: poison ladder rebalance

evals.query: this mod's cheese wheel gives instant health on eat which feels wrong in requiem, whats the right effect setup
evals.note: instant-heal food anti-pattern, lowercase casual

evals.query: my custom wine needs the right Requiem keywords and that inebriation debuff thing
evals.note: alcohol keywords + Inebriation, vague user recall

evals.query: patch this modded steel greatsword so its damage fits Requiem's tiers
evals.note: near-miss: 'patch X for Requiem' but a weapon -> requiem-weapon-patching

evals.query: design a brand-new alchemy magic effect that drains shouts, balanced for Requiem
evals.note: near-miss: new MGEF design -> requiem-magic-patching (this skill wires existing effects)

evals.query: get my mod's potions to actually show up in dungeon loot and vendor inventories
evals.note: near-miss: potions, but the task is leveled-list/vendor placement -> requiem-leveled-list-patching

evals.query: write a SkyPatcher ini that doubles the gold value of all vanilla potions
evals.note: tricky near-miss: potions + value, but explicitly SkyPatcher runtime patching -> skypatcher-authoring

evals.query: use KID to add a keyword to every piece of food in my load order
evals.note: near-miss: food + keywords, but runtime KID distribution -> kid-authoring

evals.query: what's the best potion setup to carry for a Requiem legendary difficulty run?
evals.note: near-miss: gameplay advice about Requiem potions, not patch authoring

evals.query: this follower mod's NPC needs Requiem perks and factions set up properly
evals.note: near-miss: NPC patching -> requiem-npc-patching

evals.query: the eating animation for soup clips through the bowl, can you fix the OAR config
evals.note: near-miss: food-adjacent but an animation config problem -> oar-authoring

evals.query: add a drinking fountain activator to my player home that restores stamina
evals.note: near-miss: drinking + restore, but an ACTI/world-object job, not an ALCH record

evals.query: my quest mod hands out a scripted potion that teleports you — the script property broke under Requiem
evals.note: tricky near-miss: a potion, but the task is the script layer -> requiem-script-patching
